description: Explore AT&T's enterprise AI vendor portfolio — contracts, committed spend vs actuals, governance addenda coverage, and by-BU breakdowns. Tables include AI vendor contracts (with deployment region, service category, commitment type, and governance flags), AI services catalog, and quarterly spend transactions. Tables join on agreement_id and service_id. Use gold_ai_spend_by_vendor_bu for portfolio views, gold_contract_summary for per-contract drill-down including overage and governance flags, and gold_bu_ai_overview for business-unit-level metrics.
sample_questions: Which AI vendor contracts are trending over committed spend this quarter, and by how much?
What is our total AI vendor spend by service category and business unit, ranked by committed value?
Which AI contracts expire in the next 90 days or are missing an AI governance addendum?
Show me total committed AI spend by vendor, ranked
Which business units have the most active AI contracts without a training-data restriction clause?
What is the total overage spend across all active AI contracts?
Compare LLM API spend to ML Platform spend across the portfolio
Which vendors have the most BU-level coverage at AT&T?
List all contracts with FedRAMP or HIPAA certifications
What is the average spend utilization ratio for Enterprise-tier contracts versus Standard-tier?
